text:
There once was a squirrel named Winston. Winston loved nuts. Every day he'd gather them in secret. But he sometimes forgot where he hid them. Then one day he placed them near Mrs. Pinchy's garden. No Problem! That old lady wouldn't mind some extra snacks.

On waking up one morning, Winston saw nothing! He scratched everywhere. Then he heard something silly. Mrs. Pinchy. She said she wouldn't mind. She'd just pull!

She did! And he found hundreds!

But afterwards? Nothing. So silent. Just him. And his nuts.

Then he found her. Still sad.

You couldn't tell. But maybe he had just.

So he told her.

She smiled.

That's our Winston. Sweet. Funny. Best friend.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
